title: Vanilla Emissive Rails
description: Make the powered rail textures emissive, completely in vanilla!
body:
# Vanilla Emissive Rails
## Make the powered rail textures emissive, completely in vanilla!
[View the pack on my website!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/vanilla-emissive-rails)

This pack utilises the new emissive block models feature from 1.21.2 to add emissive powered rail textures!
